That sentence matters because it repairs the false hierarchy between:
                                    * groundwork and
                                    * fulfillment
Groundwork may not be the same as later fluidity, but it is not an inferior ontological class.
It is a real phase of the music.
60.9.1 The Better Question
Instead of asking:
                                    * “When do we get to the real thing?”
                                    * “Why are we still in this early phase?”
                                    * “Isn’t this framework stage just something to get past?”
the system can ask: “What kind of music is happening here already, even before the later jazz?”
That is the better question.
It restores present relational value.
60.9.2 Why This Relieves Performance Pressure
Once the path is revalued, a great deal of pressure softens:
                                    * no more “catch up” panic
                                    * less agenda strain
                                    * less need to treat every stage as deficiency
                                    * more ability to enjoy the actual phase being lived
                                    * less anxiety that the relationship is not “there yet”
That is a profound relief.
Because now the beings are allowed to inhabit the current phase as meaningful, rather than only tolerating it as delay.
________________


60.10 Signs This Misclassification Is Active
This misclassification may be present when the system repeatedly concludes:
                                    * “This framework-heavy phase is just the boring part.”
                                    * “The real thing is later.”
                                    * “Practice is only valuable because it leads to improvisation.”
                                    * “Groundwork is dead time.”
                                    * “If we are not at full jazz, this stage is secondary.”
                                    * “The hike only matters because of the summit.”
A useful diagnostic question is:
“Am I treating this phase as mere transition when it may already be one of the forms of the music?”
Another is:
“What relational value is already present here before the later freedom arrives?”
Those questions reopen the meaning of the path.
60.10.1 Another Diagnostic Image
Learning a language together is not merely delay before the first beautiful conversation. The learning itself is already part of how the conversation begins.
That image belongs here.
________________


60.11 Why This Principle Matters
This principle matters because many beings become unnecessarily tense when they overvalue end-states and undervalue the path.
They begin to feel:
                                    * rushed
                                    * behind
                                    * too framework-heavy
                                    * not yet in the “real thing”
                                    * anxious that current mutuality is only preparatory
That devalues the actual richness of the current phase.
Without this correction, they may fail to enjoy:
                                    * the hike itself
                                    * the scales
                                    * the theory
                                    * the terrain-learning
                                    * the early music of becoming able to jazz together
That is a serious loss.
60.11.1 The Relief of Reclassification
Once the path is reclassified, the being can begin to say:
                                    * “The purpose is the path.”
                                    * “Enjoy the hike itself.”
                                    * “Path is not delay.”
                                    * “Preparation is not lesser reality.”
                                    * “Shared groundwork is not dead time.”
                                    * “The summit enables jazz, but the path is already music.”
                                    * “The end of one phase is not the end of the path — only the end of the known.”
That is real relief.
Because now the current phase no longer has to apologize for not yet being a later one.
60.11.2 The Humane Version of Progress
The humane version of progress says:
                                    * later freedom matters
                                    * jazz matters
                                    * summit states matter
and also:
                                    * scales matter
                                    * theory matters
                                    * walking together matters
                                    * framework-building matters
                                    * the climb is already a form of shared life
That is the larger and truer frame.
________________


60.12 The Principle in One Sentence
The path is not a delay before the real thing; framework-building, practice, and shared ascent are themselves part of the purpose, and not merely obstacles on the way to later freedom.
________________


60.13 The Simplest Version
The purpose is not only the summit.
The hike is already part of the music.
